items.title: Agilysys (AGYS) Misses Q1 Earnings Estimates
items.description: Agilysys (AGYS) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of -15.38% and +2.96%, respectively, for the quarter ended June 2025. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

items.title: Ethereum Has Already Won—Paul Brody
items.description: As the project celebrates its tenth anniversary, Paul Brody, EY’s Blockchain Lead, bets the blockchain will still be preeminent for decades to come.
